product.name: Berlin Modisch Contemporary Square Entry Lever Door Handle and Single Cylinder Deadbolt Locking Lever Handle Set [Front Door or Office] Right & Left Sided Doors Heavy Duty – Satin Nickel Finish

features: Designed to complement modern contemporary style interior and exterior doors for commercial and residential applications front entry door handleset lever and deadbolt set
Heavy duty high grade security door dead bolt and lever knob reversible that makes it perfect for fitting left or right handed doors
Uniquely crafted low profile square shaped door lever and dead-bolt Entrance Set With 2 3/8 inch- 2 3/4 inch adjustable backset latches and square corner strikers

Durable & Portable secure handle & deadbolt which Fits 1-3/8-Inch-1-3/4-Inch doors silver nickel finish.
